notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Cam Smith singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Evan Carter. Taylor Trammell scores. Cam Smith to 2nd. Cam Smith advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by center fielder Evan Carter.

notableEvents.label: Isaac Paredes GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Isaac Paredes grounds into a double play, second baseman Nicky Lopez to shortstop Ezequiel Duran to first baseman Jake Burger. Jeremy Peña out at 2nd. Isaac Paredes out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by pitcher Spencer Arrighetti on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: Joc Pederson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Joc Pederson grounds into a double play, second baseman Brice Matthews to shortstop Jeremy Peña to first baseman Isaac Paredes. Nicky Lopez out at 2nd. Joc Pederson out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Justin Foscue pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Justin Foscue pops out to second baseman Nick Allen.
